THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, SHERMAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3649 MARKET STREET #303, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES. DECEMBER RENT OF $920 TO BE PAID TO PLTF BY DEC 5, 1995. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PLTF MAY RETAIN ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT OR LAST MONTH'S RENT IN ITS POSSESSION.IF CONDITIONS MET, PLTF SHALL VACATE JUDGMNT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
